PHYS-REVIEW-01.exact_report: final physical carrier-state review for regenerated hash set
PHYS-REVIEW-01.mechanism: Temperature custody is now restricted to an approved CPU sensor identity with hwmon name, label, resolved paths, digest, descriptor pinning, and identity-stability checks. Self-authored discovery receipts require an external controller challenge and nonce binding.
PHYS-REVIEW-01.consequence: Non-CPU sensors, path substitutions, identity drift, synthetic identities, and recomputed forged discovery receipts cannot authorize frozen status.
PHYS-REVIEW-01.minimal_repair: Implemented approved k10temp/Tctl-or-Tdie identity binding plus controller-challenge-bound temperature authority validation.
PHYS-REVIEW-01.required_regression: Target and controller regressions reject non-CPU-first sensors, wrong hwmon/label, substitutions, drift, unreadable sensors, synthetic authority, and well-formed self-authored discovery without the expected challenge.

OPER-REVIEW-01.exact_report: final experimental-design/operator review for regenerated hash set
OPER-REVIEW-01.mechanism: The operator path now preserves query_A, query_B, query_A_then_B, and query_B_then_A as raw modeled observations. Matched contrasts remain derived quantities for lifetime/sign laws only. Query order is reported as order-encoded query identity rather than an unsupported independent main effect.
OPER-REVIEW-01.consequence: Per-query responses remain visible to modeling/classification, and identical pairwise contrasts with different raw responses remain distinguishable.
OPER-REVIEW-01.minimal_repair: Use raw change_to_dirty as operator y, store matched_contrast_y separately, remove duplicate query_order basis, and expose on-support identifiability.
OPER-REVIEW-01.required_regression: Equal-pairwise-contrast different-raw-response fixture remains distinct; query/order/source-order structure gates pass.

OPER-REVIEW-02.exact_report: final experimental-design/operator review for regenerated hash set
OPER-REVIEW-02.mechanism: Strict held-out replicate, mapping, and delay tests remove the tested factor level from training.
OPER-REVIEW-02.consequence: Held-out prediction is no longer rescued by seeing the same mapping or delay level in training.
OPER-REVIEW-02.minimal_repair: Train/test predicates now isolate replicate 1, map1, and 10ms as absent held-out levels.
OPER-REVIEW-02.required_regression: Mapping-scrambled, delay-scrambled, and in-sample-rescue fixtures remain candidate/fail the strict holdout gate.

OPER-REVIEW-03.exact_report: final experimental-design/operator review for regenerated hash set
OPER-REVIEW-03.mechanism: Cross-validated classification is computed using a nearest-centroid-by-q classifier, held-out replicate split, 7x7 confusion matrix, balanced accuracy, and a fixed 0.95 threshold.
OPER-REVIEW-03.consequence: Observed status is downgraded unless held-out classification actually passes.
OPER-REVIEW-03.minimal_repair: Replace asserted classification boolean with computed classifier output and hard gate.
OPER-REVIEW-03.required_regression: Perfectly separated codewords pass; deliberately confused, class-imbalanced, and training-memorized held-out-failure fixtures fail.

OPER-REVIEW-04.exact_report: final experimental-design/operator review for regenerated hash set
OPER-REVIEW-04.mechanism: Lifetime analysis emits the full five-class vocabulary and session, mapping, query, confidence, and polarity variation gates.
OPER-REVIEW-04.consequence: Variation-confounded or form-changing packets downgrade instead of supporting observed status.
OPER-REVIEW-04.minimal_repair: Add full lifetime vocabulary, mean persistence curve, variation summaries, confidence intervals, and hard downgrade gates.
OPER-REVIEW-04.required_regression: Stable persistence, bounded decay, immediate-only, no-response, nonmonotonic form change, session/mapping/query confounds, equal-marginal crossover, sign reversal, and opposite-sign replicate fixtures pass/downgrade as expected.

remaining_blockers: actual provenance-bound temperature sensor authority receipt absent
